## Does this fit Quad's principles?

(See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md))

- [ ] No new SDK runtime dependency
- [ ] No server-side LLM calls beyond Whisper STT
- [ ] Self-host first (no SaaS-only assumptions)
- [ ] Doesn't reintroduce multi-tenant workspace abstractions
